channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Checks and Balance newsletter: The weirdness of American socialism
item.description: John Prideaux, our executive editor, on the rise of a new political class from the activist left

item.title: What the Pentagon’s CMC List Means for China-US Relations
item.description: The new list of Chinese Military Companies includes some of China’s best-known private firms: Tencent, DJI, Unitree, and Alibaba.

item.title: Space Technology is Redefining Maritime Security in South Asia
item.description: The future of maritime security in the Indian Ocean will be defined not by control of sea lanes alone, but by the ability to monitor, interpret, and act in real time.

item.title: India and Australia Are Reshaping What It Means To Be Strategic Partners
item.description: Amid power shifts in the Indo-Pacific, there is greater realization in both countries of each other’s value as a stable, reliable partner.

item.title: Debate in Delhi on Trump, Trust, and Strategic Choices
item.description: Are India’s fraying relations with the US transient, or do they represent a fundamental rupture with long-term impacts on US-India relations and India’s growth story?
